description: Practical frontend performance budgets for QueenZone public pages. Checks are advisory by default; do not fail CI on these until CI variance is understood.
notes: LCP and CLS use Core Web Vitals 'good' thresholds as upper bounds.
Byte and request budgets target a lean archive shell after compression and static-asset caching work (#162-#165).
Local sample-data runs are typically well under these budgets; production and throttled mobile runs are the meaningful comparison.
Per-path overrides are optional. Missing keys inherit from the form-factor defaults.

/.label: Homepage
/.notes: Hero image may dominate transfer size; keep LCP-critical work small.
